share.title: Share with client
share.description: Send this link to your client so they can track project progress.
share.regenerateWarning: The old link will be immediately invalidated.
share.smsMessage: Hello, track your project progress here: {url}
share.emailBody:
Hello,

You can track your project progress here:
{url}

Kind regards

limit.title: Limit reached
limit.description: The free plan is limited to 3 active or paused projects. Upgrade to PRO for unlimited projects.

deleteConfirm.title: Delete project?
deleteConfirm.description: This action is irreversible. All associated photos, time entries and materials will be deleted.

empty.title: No projects
empty.description: Create your first project to get started.

new.title: New project
new.subtitle: Enter the basic details to start a new project.

time.empty: No entries yet. Add your working hours in the form.

materials.label: Name / Description
materials.empty: No materials added yet. Use the form to track your purchases.

photos.empty: No photos yet. Upload images above.

clientAction.signatureDesc: Have your client sign directly on your screen to validate a step.

signatureDialog.title: Signature of {clientName}
signatureDialog.desc: Please sign below with your finger or a stylus to validate.
signatureDialog.closeProjectDesc: Mark the project as complete once signed to free up your quotas.

publicView.invalidLinkDesc: This project is no longer shared. Please contact your artisan for a new link.
publicView.noPhotosDesc: The artisan has not yet shared any progress photos.
